results.title: Ragie
results.description: Ragie provides secure Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) APIs for developers, enabling easy ingestion of diverse file types, semantic search, and context generation for LLMs, supported by connectors and SDKs.

results.title: Ragie TypeScript
results.description: Ragie is a TypeScript SDK that provides tools for interacting with AI applications, functioning as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and exposing SDK methods as invokable tools.

results.title: Ragie Python
results.description: Ragie Python is an SDK that allows developers to interact with the Ragie API for document management and connection creation, supporting both synchronous and asynchronous operations.

results.title: RAGLite
results.description: RAGLite is a fast, permissive, and extensible Python toolkit for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using DuckDB or PostgreSQL, supporting various LLMs, rerankers, and advanced chunking techniques.

results.title: Ragatouille
results.description: RAGatouille makes it easy to use and train state-of-the-art retrieval methods in any RAG pipeline, focusing on simplifying the use of ColBERT.

results.title: RAGatouille
results.description: RAGatouille is a Python library that democratizes state-of-the-art document retrieval using late-interaction methods like ColBERT, enabling semantic keyword matching with just a few lines of code.

results.title: RAWG.io
results.description: RAWG.io is a comprehensive video game database and discovery service, offering an extensive API for developers to access game information, user data, and collections.

results.title: raygui
results.description: raygui is a simple and easy-to-use immediate-mode GUI library, originally inspired by Unity IMGUI, designed as an auxiliary module for raylib but adaptable to other frameworks.

results.title: Ragcoon
results.description: RAGcoon is an agentic Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system designed to assist users in building their startups by providing intelligent context retrieval and response generation.

results.title: BaseChat
results.description: Base Chat is a multi-tenant RAG chatbot that connects to an organization's knowledgebase using Ragie Connect, showcasing Ragie's features with LLM support and customizable interfaces.

results.title: Ragenix
results.description: Ragenix is a Rust-based replacement for agenix that provides age-encrypted secrets for NixOS systems, enabling creation, editing, and rekeying of secrets with enhanced command-line parsing and plugin support.

results.title: RAG Battles
results.description: Head to head testing of popular RAG solutions.

results.title: RAG API
results.description: This project integrates Langchain with FastAPI for asynchronous document indexing and retrieval using PostgreSQL/pgvector, enabling targeted queries based on file IDs and metadata.

results.title: Piragi
results.description: Piragi is a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) interface that enables querying multiple data sources including local files, cloud storage, and web content with built-in vector embeddings, citations, and support for local LLMs.

results.title: R2R
results.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.

results.title: Rig
results.description: Rig is a Rust library for building LLM-powered applications with support for completion, embeddings, agents, RAG systems, and integrations with multiple AI providers.

results.title: RAG Company Wayman
results.description: A full-stack question-answering application using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture that enables users to query local knowledge bases like PDF reports with accurate answers.

results.title: RAGFlow
results.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG engine that uses deep document understanding to provide truthful question-answering with citations from complex data.

results.title: Rig
results.description: Rig is a Rust library for building portable, modular, and lightweight Fullstack AI Agents, offering full support for LLM completion and embedding workflows with simple abstractions over various providers and vector stores.

results.title: RAiX
results.description: Raix is a Ruby library that integrates discrete large-language model (LLM) AI components into Ruby applications, offering features like chat completions, predicted outputs, prompt caching, and JSON mode.

results.title: RSG
results.description: RSG is an ever-expanding, customizable, and easy-to-use framework for Red Dead Redemption 2, built on the RedM platform with ongoing maintenance and community support.

results.title: Rookie
results.description: Rookie is a fast, cross-platform library built with Rust that enables loading cookies from various browsers on Windows, Linux, and macOS, with bindings available for Rust, Python, and JavaScript.

results.title: Rig
results.description: Rig is a Rust library for building scalable, modular, and ergonomic LLM-powered applications, offering full support for LLM completion and embedding workflows with simple abstractions over providers and vector stores.

results.title: Rhai
results.description: Rhai is an embedded scripting language and evaluation engine for Rust, offering a safe and easy way to add scripting capabilities to applications with a JavaScript+Rust-like syntax and tight integration with native Rust functions and types.

results.title: rpxy
results.description: rpxy is a simple, ultrafast, and lightweight reverse-proxy written in Rust, serving multiple domain names with TLS termination, supporting HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and gRPC.

results.title: Self-RAG
results.description: Self-RAG is a novel framework that trains large language models to retrieve information, generate responses, and critique their own outputs through self-reflection, improving the factuality and quality of generations.

results.title: Pagy
results.description: Pagy is the best pagination Ruby Gem, offering wicked-fast keyset pagination, support for various environments and collections, and multiple pagination types for efficient data handling.

results.title: Rhai
results.description: Rhai is an embedded scripting language and evaluation engine for Rust, providing a safe and easy way to add scripting capabilities to any application.

results.title: Rapier
results.description: Rapier is a set of 2D and 3D physics engines written in Rust for real-time applications like video games, animation, and robotics, featuring rigid-body collisions, joint constraints, and cross-platform determinism.

results.title: RAG-Anything
results.description: "RAG-Anything: All-in-One RAG System"
